description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior features large glass windows and sliding doors, with blue-tinted railings on the balconies and rooftop areas. The house includes an external staircase leading to the upper level, a carport or garage area, and a spacious patio with a pool. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and the house sits on a rectangular plot with paved walkways. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and open spaces. The use of glass and concrete gives the house a contemporary, airy feel.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, blue railings, and a poolside patio, set on a landscaped plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, blue balcony railings, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase, carport/garage, and the pool area with adjacent landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with more windows, a balcony, and additional trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the rear entry, with a prominent tree in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a large glass door, and a minimalist overhang, flanked by windows and landscaping
